name: Base Alloy Flooring
description: Standard floor tiles used at the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base. They are made up of metal plates of various shapes fitted together to create a visually appealing floor with a sense of depth. Use these tiles to create a mottled, staggered design for a unique and lively interior look. Although this innovative design does increase the difficulty and cost of installation and maintenance, it is a drawback that is effectively offset by the use of recycled metal materials.
